artifacts.name: Data Protection Policy
artifacts.description: Overarching policy covering data classification, encryption, DLP, key management, backup, and disposal requirements.

artifacts.name: Data Classification Policy
artifacts.description: Detailed policy defining classification levels, criteria, handling requirements, and labeling standards.

artifacts.name: Encryption Standards
artifacts.description: Technical standards defining approved algorithms, key lengths, cipher suites, and implementation requirements.
keyContents: Approved symmetric algorithms and key lengths

artifacts.name: Key Management Procedures
artifacts.description: Procedures for the complete cryptographic key lifecycle including generation, distribution, storage, rotation, and destruction.

artifacts.name: DLP Policy and Procedures
artifacts.description: Policy and procedures for data loss prevention including detection rules, incident handling, and exception management.

artifacts.name: Backup and Recovery Policy
artifacts.description: Policy defining backup requirements including frequency, encryption, immutability, retention, and recovery testing.

artifacts.name: Database Security Standards
artifacts.description: Standards for database hardening, access controls, monitoring, and encryption.

artifacts.name: Data Masking and Tokenization Procedures
artifacts.description: Procedures for static and dynamic masking, tokenization, and test data management.

artifacts.name: Secure Data Disposal Procedures
artifacts.description: Procedures for secure disposal of data and media including sanitization methods, crypto-shredding, and certification.

artifacts.name: Data Asset Inventory
artifacts.description: Living document/database containing inventory of all data assets with classification, owners, locations, and flows.

artifacts.name: Data Protection Risk Register
artifacts.description: Risk register documenting data protection risks with inherent and residual ratings, treatments, and owners.

artifacts.name: Data Breach Incident Response Playbook
artifacts.description: Playbook for responding to data breach incidents including containment, investigation, notification, and recovery procedures.

artifacts.name: Certificate Management Procedures
artifacts.description: Procedures for certificate lifecycle management including issuance, renewal, revocation, and monitoring.

artifacts.name: BYOK/HYOK Procedures
artifacts.description: Procedures for implementing and managing BYOK and HYOK for cloud services.
keyContents: BYOK import procedures per cloud provider

artifacts.name: Disaster Recovery Plan — Data Recovery
artifacts.description: DR plan section covering data recovery procedures, priorities, and dependencies.

artifacts.name: Third-Party Data Protection Assessment Template
artifacts.description: Template for assessing third-party data protection controls during vendor onboarding and ongoing monitoring.

artifacts.name: Data Retention Schedule
artifacts.description: Schedule defining retention periods for all data types aligned with legal and regulatory requirements.

artifacts.name: TLS Configuration Guide
artifacts.description: Technical guide for TLS configuration including cipher suites, protocol versions, and HSTS settings.

artifacts.name: Ransomware Recovery Playbook
artifacts.description: Specific playbook for ransomware recovery scenarios including clean room procedures and restoration priorities.

artifacts.name: API Security Standards
artifacts.description: Standards for API authentication, encryption, rate limiting, and data protection.

artifacts.name: Media Sanitization Log
artifacts.description: Log tracking all media sanitization and destruction events.

artifacts.name: HSM Operations Manual
artifacts.description: Operations manual for HSM management including access procedures, backup, and disaster recovery.

artifacts.name: Cloud Encryption Configuration Baseline
artifacts.description: Baseline configuration for cloud encryption settings across all cloud providers.

artifacts.name: Test Data Management Policy
artifacts.description: Policy prohibiting production data in non-production environments and defining test data provisioning requirements.
keyContents: Prohibition of production data in non-production

artifacts.name: Data Handling Requirements Matrix
artifacts.description: Matrix mapping classification levels to handling requirements for creation, storage, transmission, sharing, and disposal.
